name: chilu18--people-culture-playbook
description: People & Culture Playbook. Use for: recruiting strategy, skills-based hiring, structured interviews, onboarding (preboarding + 30/60/90), performance management (continuous feedback + OKRs/SMART), compensation and benefits architecture, engagement systems, learning/development, culture design, conflict resolution, DEI implementation, retention strategy, and people analytics dashboards. Trigger for any HR people-ops org-design manager coaching or workforce planning task where execution quality and measurable outcomes matter.
